title: Bulk Ground Beef and Bean Skillet Base
description: A hearty, high-protein ground beef and bean mixture designed for batch cooking and easy reuse in tacos, bowls, pasta, and more.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot or skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and bell peppers, cook until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Stir in salt, pepper, chili powder, and cumin.
Add diced tomatoes and beans, stir to combine.
Simmer for 15–20 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
Let cool slightly, then portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Microwave for 1-2 minutes stirring halfway, or reheat in a skillet over medium heat until warmed through.

batch_notes: Cook the full batch at once and divide into meal-sized portions.
This base can be used across multiple meals without additional cooking.
meal_variations: Tacos with tortillas and shredded cheese
Burrito bowls with rice and toppings
Loaded baked potatoes with beef mixture
Pasta with beef and tomato sauce base
